creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
The same error also happens on amd64 FreeBSD 13.2.  Perhaps there is a test dependency you forgot to mention?

cd /usr/home/main.ports/databases/py-ormar/work-py39/ormar-0.12.2 && /usr/bin/env PYTHONPATH=/usr/home/main.ports/databases/py-ormar/work-py39/ormar-0.12.2/src /usr/local/bin/python3.9 -m pytest -k '' -rs -v -o addopts=
